scenario_label: Live route with declared recovery disposition
notes: Declared recovery law exists but does not activate while earlier authority stages remain live.
Hydration drift keeps the route degraded even without an explicit route freeze.
Release truth may calm the route no further than read-only.
An explicit route freeze can worsen the route after capability evaluation.
Missing embedded floor capability keeps the shell recoverable but non-live.
Declared recovery law remains dormant while the declared constrained channel still matches.

scenario_label: Constrained route opened in normal browser
notes: Wrong channel profile blocks the route before the recovery action can reopen live posture.
